name: Stramasa
focus: Spiritual & conscious brands, wellness, retreats — also has a dedicated music marketing wing
notes: 80+ team, operates in 47 countries. Has specific spiritual marketing AND music marketing pages — rare double fit for Craig. Services: SEO, paid media, content, sonic branding. Global agency feel but spiritually-specific. Music marketing page: stramasa.com/music-marketing-agency/

name: Well Spirit Collective
focus: Health, wellness, sustainability — influencers, podcasts, media partnerships
notes: Woman-owned/BIPOC-led, LA-based (remote). Specializes in connecting conscious brands with top influencers, podcasters, and media. Services: influencer marketing, email acquisition, content strategy, PR, partnerships, video. Strong fit for Sanctuary audience growth. Key contact: Bess O'Connor (LinkedIn). Contact page: wellspiritcollective.com/contact

name: Aligned Amplification
focus: Spiritual entrepreneurs — SEO, social media, email marketing
notes: Specifically serves spiritual entrepreneurs. Guides on: live sessions, email nurturing, keyword research for spiritual niches, social media. Smaller/boutique feel — likely more affordable entry point. Good for Voice + SessionCraft launch outreach strategy.

name: Wellness Fractional CMO
focus: Wellness, health tech, lifestyle brands — AI-driven performance + behavioral psychology
notes: 20+ years experience. Combines AI-driven performance strategies, behavioral psychology, and data-backed systems. Would give strategic marketing leadership across all 4 platforms without full-time hire cost. Good option if Craig wants someone to OWN the marketing strategy, not just execute.

name: Magical Marketing Company
focus: Spiritual entrepreneurs — branding, website design, production
notes: Boutique agency focused on branding + web design for spiritual entrepreneurs. Could be the right fit for The Sanctuary visual identity, brand kit, and launch landing page. Less about growth strategy, more about brand presence.

name: Morgan Garza
focus: Spiritual business growth, marketing for coaches and healers
notes: Individual consultant specializing in growing spiritual businesses. More personal/accessible than an agency — likely lower budget entry point. Could be a warm outreach test. Focused on the same audience Craig is trying to reach (healers, coaches, spiritual practitioners).
